rules.name: no-hex-color
rules.description: Hardcoded hex color — use a token from globals.css

rules.name: no-rgba-literal
rules.description: rgba()/rgb()/hsl()/hsla() literal — use a token or shadow var

rules.name: no-default-tw-palette
rules.description: Default Tailwind palette class — use a project token

rules.name: no-arbitrary-color-or-text
rules.description: Arbitrary color/typography Tailwind value (bg-[#…], text-[14px]) — tokenize it. Spacing arbitraries (px-[1.5rem], gap-[2rem], w-[10rem]) are permitted.

items.snippet: <div className="h-[6rem] w-[6rem] rounded-full bg-primary-10 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-primary text-[1.5rem]">
